hypothesis_en: Madam President, Commissioner, for your brilliant and excellent words, but we still have to listen carefully to two speeches, and one day we will have to apply to this House the noise regulation that we are approving in the European dimension, because it is a very noisy House at this hour.
reference_en: thank you very much Commissioner for those brilliant words but we should listen carefully to what the Commissioner says and I think this hemicycle one day or another is going to have to actually apply noise pollution legislation that we've adopted for everybody else because there's no doubt that the noise levels here are unacceptable at times
source_es: muchas gracias señora Comisaria por sus brillantes excelentes palabras pero todavía debemos escuchar con atención dos intervenciones y algún día habrá que aplicar a este hemiciclo la normativa sobre el ruido que vamos aprobando en la dimensión europea porque es un hemiciclo muy ruidoso a estas horas (1.25) tiene la palabra en nombre del Grupo del Partido Popular Europeo y de los Demócratas Europeos el Señor Lisi
